data.body:
Hyakkaryouran Summer Rush Mini Game is open now! ⛱️

Enjoy playing with the Hyakkaryouran students and earn a high score!

Link your account on the web page to earn even more rewards!

➡️Details: bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2025/11…
